build.beforeBuildCommand: pnpm exec tsc -b && pnpm exec vite build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420
